## Citation Reference

Bibliography entry number and location (e.g., "cite24, Q1 — Clinical Holds section"):

## Current Claim

Quote the specific claim as it appears in the study:

## Problem

- [ ] Citation link is broken or inaccessible
- [ ] Cited source does not support the stated claim
- [ ] Stronger primary source exists
- [ ] Regulatory guidance has been updated or superseded
- [ ] Numerical figure is incorrect

## Proposed Correction

State the corrected claim and provide the supporting source URL:

## Source Verification

Direct link to the primary or authoritative secondary source:

---
*All evidence corrections are reviewed against primary sources. Assertions without traceable sources will not be merged.*
